title: taraxacum retzii
intro: Taraxacum retzii, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to its leaves and roots containing compounds such as taraxasterol, which is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum retzii include potential improvements in digestive issues, immune system function, and liver health, as well as reduced inflammation and improved antioxidant levels. Taraxacum retzii can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
